name: v0-project
description: An agent-built repository of learnings from the 100 greatest public-markets investors, living and dead. - One research task is executed per hourly run. Queue: `_admin/TODO.md`. History: `_admin/LOG.md`. Standards: `_admin/RESEARCH_SPEC.md`. Procedure: `_admin/HOURLY_RUNBOOK.md`. - Each investor gets a folder under `investors/` with 8 standard documents (see spec). - Cross-investor insights accumulate in `synthesis/`. Master directory: `INDEX.md`.
